[?25l[38;2;201;209;217m[48;2;1;4;9m[1;6Hopencode-triple-id-redacted","nodeI[1C":"agen[1C-a","runId":"ru[1C-      [2;6Hopencode:id-redacted:m40a1sys","attempt":1},"expectedD[1Cliver[1Cble":{      [3;7Hschema":"completion_payload_v1","requiredFields":["statu[1C","summary",[4;6H"artifactReferenc[1Cs","filesChanged","dow[1CstreamPayload"],[13X[38;2;255;255;255m[48;2;13;17;23m[13C [38;2;201;209;217m[48;2;1;4;9m[5;6H"statusOptions":["success","failure"],"notes":"Return structured      [6;6Hcompletion data and route downstream only through explicit graph [7;6Htargets."},"handoff":{"fromNodeIds":[],"legalTargets":[{"condition":[8;7Halways[1C,[1Callow[1CdOutcomes":["success","failure"]}]}}} --- END ENVELOPE[48;2;13;17;23m [48;2;1;4;9m[9;6H---[54X[38;2;13;17;23m[48;2;188;140;255m[1m[10;6H QUEUED [38;2;255;255;255m[48;2;1;4;9m[22m[57X[11;6H[65X[48;2;13;17;23m[12;3H[73X[48;2;1;4;9m[13;6H[70X[48;2;13;17;23m[70C [38;2;201;209;217m[48;2;1;4;9m[14;6H...[truncated 17 chars]
